task: put the yellow block on the table
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A yellow block is on a shelf, a white tray is on the table below. The block is a cube with a matte surface; the tray is a rectangular container. STRATEGY - Reach the block, grasp it, transport it to the tray, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misplacing it outside the tray. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the block at its body; Step 2 grasp the block at its body for secure hold; Step 3 transport the block to the tray; Step 4 place the block inside the tray.
Goal: inside(yellow_block, white_tray)
Scene: yellow_block, white_tray, shelf, table
Step 1: reach(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: holding(yellow_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_block)
Step 3: transport(yellow_block -> white_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the white tray
  spatial: above(yellow_block, white_tray, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_block)
  done_when: above(yellow_block, white_tray, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_block -> white_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the white tray
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_block, white_tray) [completion]; released(yellow_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_block, white_tray) AND released(yellow_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
the body of the yellow block
an empty area inside the white tray
an empty area inside the white tray
